blended.narrative: Whiteface is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 28 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 42°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: light rain, highs of 42°F, winds around 21 mph.
Thursday: 5" of snow, highs of 48°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 2.6" of snow, highs of 19°F. Expect powder.
Saturday: 3.7" of snow, highs of 20°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 6" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Tuesday: 9" of heavy snow, highs of 17°F. Expect powder.
